metadata.changelog: 1.1.0 — operator-ready: zone devices, comfort dashboard, high-temp alert (was catalog stub)

migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hvac_zone (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, zone_code VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, space_temp_c NUMERIC(6,2) NOT NULL, setpoint_c NUMERIC(6,2) NOT NULL, mode VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL); INSERT INTO hvac_zone (id, zone_code, space_temp_c, setpoint_c, mode) SELECT 'aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa', 'L1-OPEN-01', 22.4, 22.0, 'cool' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hvac_zone WHERE zone_code = 'L1-OPEN-01'); INSERT INTO hvac_zone (id, zone_code, space_temp_c, setpoint_c, mode) SELECT 'bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb', 'L2-MEET-02', 23.1, 21.5, 'heat' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hvac_zone WHERE zone_code = 'L2-MEET-02');

blueprints.name: hvac-zone-v1
blueprints.description: HVAC comfort zone with space temperature and setpoint

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"zones","sql":"SELECT zone_code, space_temp_c, setpoint_c, mode FROM hvac_zone ORDER BY zone_code"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${zones}","fields":{"zone":"${item.zone_code}","spaceTempC":"${item.space_temp_c}","setpointC":"${item.setpoint_c}","mode":"${item.mode}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

dashboards.title: Building comfort
dashboards.layoutJson: {"columns":84,"rowHeight":8,"widgets":[{"id":"z1-temp","type":"value","title":"L1 Open · temp","x":0,"y":0,"w":21,"h":14,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.hvac-zone-l1-open","variableName":"spaceTemp","valueField":"value","decimals":1,"unit":"°C"},{"id":"z1-sp","type":"value","title":"L1 Open · setpoint","x":21,"y":0,"w":21,"h":14,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.hvac-zone-l1-open","variableName":"setpoint","valueField":"value","decimals":1,"unit":"°C"},{"id":"z2-temp","type":"value","title":"L2 Meet · temp","x":42,"y":0,"w":21,"h":14,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.hvac-zone-l2-meet","variableName":"spaceTemp","valueField":"value","decimals":1,"unit":"°C"},{"id":"z2-sp","type":"value","title":"L2 Meet · setpoint","x":63,"y":0,"w":21,"h":14,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.hvac-zone-l2-meet","variableName":"setpoint","valueField":"value","decimals":1,"unit":"°C"},{"id":"z1-trend","type":"chart","title":"L1 space temperature","x":0,"y":14,"w":42,"h":28,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.hvac-zone-l1-open","variableName":"spaceTemp","valueField":"value","chartStyle":"line","maxPoints":120,"historyRange":"live","color":"#2f81f7","decimals":1},{"id":"z2-trend","type":"chart","title":"L2 space temperature","x":42,"y":14,"w":42,"h":28,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.hvac-zone-l2-meet","variableName":"spaceTemp","valueField":"value","chartStyle":"line","maxPoints":120,"historyRange":"live","color":"#3fb950","decimals":1}]}
